title: xyris exilis
intro: Xyris exilis is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae, commonly known as the yellow-eyed grass. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Xyris exilis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Xyris exilis often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and roots, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in the form of ointments or poultices.
